content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Best_of_2009.jpg|thumb|300px|The best of 2009]]
A list of events in '''2009''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Insider 106|''Star Wars Insider'' 106]] published.
*[[January 2|02]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']]: "[[Dooku Captured]]" aired.
*02 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Bait]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[January 4|04]] – [[Angela Morley]] dies.
*[[January 7|07]] – ''[[Dark Times: Blue Harvest, Part 1]]'' released.
*[[January 9|09]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Gungan General]]" aired.
*09 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Switch]]'' webcomic published on StarWars.com.
*[[January 14|14]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Rise of the Sith]]'' published.
*[[January 15|15]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Headgames]]'' webcomic published on StarWars.com.
*[[January 16|16]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Jedi Crash]]" aired.
*[[January 20|20]] – ''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*[[January 21|21]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 37|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 37]] published.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 5: The Hidden Temple]]'' published.
*21 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Neighbors]]'' released.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Rise of the Sith]]'' published.
*21 – [[Star Wars Insider 107|''Star Wars Insider'' 107]] published.
*[[January 23|23]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Defenders of Peace]]" aired.
*[[January 27|27]] – ''[[Coruscant Nights III: Patterns of Force]]'' published.
*[[January 28|28]] – [[Legacy (2006) 32|''Legacy'' (2006) 32]] published.
*[[January 29|29]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Cold Snap]]'' published on StarWars.com.
*[[January 30|30]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Trespass]]" aired.

==February==
*[[February 4|04]] – ''[[Dark Times: Blue Harvest, Part 2]]'' released.
*04 – ''[[Star Wars: Vector Volume 1, Chapters 1 & 2]]'' released.
*[[February 5|05]] – Various [[Clone Wars (disambiguation)|''The Clone Wars'']] books released.
**''[[The Clone Wars: Ambush]]''
**''[[The Clone Wars: Grievous Attacks!]]''
**''[[The Clone Wars: Jedi Activity Cards]]''
**''[[The Clone Wars: Bombad Jedi]]''
*05 – "[[Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji]]" published.
*05 – ''[[The Gem of Alderaan]]'' eighth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[February 6|06]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Hidden Enemy]]" aired.
*06 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Shadowed]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*06 – ''[[Fanboys]]'' released in theaters.
*[[February 11|11]] – [[The Clone Wars 4|''The Clone Wars'' 4]] released.
*[[February 13|13]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Blue Shadow Virus (episode)|Blue Shadow Virus]]" and "[[Mystery of a Thousand Moons]]" aired.
*13 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Valley]]'' webcomic published on StarWars.com.
*13 – [[Disney XD]] is launched.
*[[February 16|16]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Jedi Adventures]]'' published.
*[[February 18|18]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 38|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 38]] released.
*[[February 25|25]] – [[Legacy (2006) 33|''Legacy'' (2006) 33]] released.
*25 – [[Star Wars: Legacy: The Hidden Temple|''Star Wars: Legacy: The Hidden Temple'' TPB]] released.
*[[February 26|26]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Covetous]]'' webcomic published on StarWars.com.
*[[February 27|27]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Storm Over Ryloth]]" aired.
*27 – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 1: Treaty of Coruscant]]'' webcomic begins publishing.
*?? – [[2009 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 4|2009 Topps ''Star Wars Galaxy'' Series 4]] released.

==March==
*[[March 6|06]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Innocents of Ryloth]]" aired.
*[[March 9|09]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Curfew]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[March 12|12]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Ballad of Cham Syndulla]]'' webcomic published on StarWars.com.
*[[March 13|13]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Liberty on Ryloth]]" aired.
*[[March 17|17]] – ''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*[[March 18|18]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 39|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 39]] released.
*[[March 19|19]] – [[Star Wars Insider 108|''Star Wars Insider'' 108]] published.
*19 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Invitation Only]]'' webcomic published on StarWars.com.
*[[March 20|20]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Hostage Crisis]]" aired.
*[[March 24|24]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]'' released.
*24 - [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: A Galaxy Divided|Star Wars: The Clone Wars: "A Galaxy Divided"]] released.
*[[March 25|25]] – [[Legacy (2006) 34|''Legacy'' (2006) 34]] released.
*[[March 27|27]] – ''[[Timeline 1: Treaty of Coruscant]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*27 – [[Anthony Daniels]] visits [[Star Wars: The Exhibition]] in Madrid.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Emissaries and Assassins]]'' released.
*[[April 2|02]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Mobile Squadrons]]'' released.
*02 – [[Frank Springer]] dies.
*[[April 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Trials]]'' released on the [[LeapFrog Didj]] console.
*[[April 10|10]] – [[Star Wars: A Musical Journey (event)|''Star Wars: A Musical Journey'']] debuts in London, UK.
*[[April 15|15]] – [[The Clone Wars 5|''The Clone Wars'' 5]] released.
*[[April 18|18]] – [[Peter Dennis]] dies.
*[[April 20|20]] – [[Thomas Hill]] dies.
*[[April 22|22]] – [[Dark Times 13|''Dark Times'' 13]] released.
*22 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 40|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 40]] released.
*[[April 25|25]] – [[Bea Arthur]] dies.
*[[April 28|28]] – [[Star Wars Insider 109|''Star Wars Insider'' 109]] published.
*[[April 29|29]] – [[Legacy (2006) 35|''Legacy'' (2006) 35]] released.
*29 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 6: Vindication]]'' released.
*29 – [[Star Wars Adventures (Dark Horse Comics)|Star Wars Adventures]] begins with [[Star Wars Adventures: Han Solo and the Hollow Moon of Khorya|''Han Solo and the Hollow Moon of Khorya'']].

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]'' released.
*[[May 2|02]] – A one-shot comic, ''[[The Clone Wars: The Gauntlet of Death]]'' offered as part of [[Free Comic Book Day]].
*[[May 7|07]] – ''[[Sword of the Empire]]'', also titled '''''The Sword of the Empire''''', ninth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[May 8|08]] – ''[[Invasion 0, Part 1]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[May 12|12]] – ''[[The Battle of Turak IV]]'' is released on StarWars.com.
*[[May 13|13]] – [[The Clone Wars 6|''The Clone Wars'' 6]] released.
*[[May 15|15]] – ''[[Timeline 2: The Mandalorian Blockade is Broken]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[May 19|19]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: No Prisoners]]'' is released.
*19 – ''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]'' is released.
*19 – 10th anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].
*[[May 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: Vector Volume 2, Chapters 3 & 4]]'' is released.
*20 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 41|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 41]] is released.
*[[May 22|22]]-[[May 24|24]] – The tenth [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]].
*[[May 25|25]]: Memorial Day: Darth Vader & Oscar the Grouch have a cameo appearance in ''Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian''.
*[[May 27|27]] – [[Legacy (2006) 36|''Legacy'' (2006) 36]] released.
*[[May 28|28]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Wind Raiders of Taloraan]]'' released.
*28 – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Precipice]]'' released.
*[[May 29|29]]-[[May 31|31]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*29 – ''[[Gunship Over Florrum]]'' released on StarWars.com.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[Deceived]]'' trailer released.
*01 – "[[Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[June 5|05]] – ''[[Invasion 0, Part 2]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*05-[[June 7|07]], [[June 12|12]]-[[June 14|14]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 12|12]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters (Part I)]]'' published on StarWars.com.
*[[June 15|15]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Forces of Darkness]]'' published.
*15 – ''[[Plug it in and Play: Motion Flight Game: Star Wars: Republic Squadron]]'' released.
*[[June 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Insider 110|''Star Wars Insider'' 110]] published.
*[[June 17|17]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 42|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 42]] published.
*[[June 19|19]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 1: Treaty of Coruscant]]'' webcomic concludes.
*[[June 23|23]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]'' published.
*[[June 24|24]] – [[Legacy (2006) 37|''Legacy'' (2006) 37]] published.
*24 – ''[[Agents of Deception]]'', the fourth card set of the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game|Galaxies Trading Card Game]] released.
*[[June 29|29]] – The [[The Clone Wars: Downfall of a Droid|''Downfall of a Droid'']] and [[The Clone Wars: Destroy Malevolence|''Destroy Malevolence'']] storybooks released.

==July==
*?? - ''[[The Art of Star Wars Comics: 100 Collectible Postcards]]'' released.
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Invasion 1|''Invasion'' 1]] released.
*[[July 3|03]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 2: New Galactic Order]]'' webcomic begins publishing online.
*03 – ''[[Timeline 3: The Return of the Mandalorians]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[July 7|07]] – ''[[Swamp Station Sweep]]'' released.
*[[July 15|15]] – [[Jamaal Avery Jr.]] is born.
*15 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 43|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 43]] released.
*15 – [[The Clone Wars 7|''The Clone Wars'' 7]] released.
*15 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' released.
*[[July 16|16]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters (Part II)]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[July 21|21]] – ''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' released.
*21 – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Skyborn]]'' released.
*[[July 22|22]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Menace Revealed]]'' released.
*[[July 23|23]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Captured]]'' released.
*23 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Battle for Ryloth]]'' released.
*[[July 28|28]] – [[Star Wars Insider 111|''Star Wars Insider'' 111]] published.
*[[July 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Princess Leia and the Royal Ransom]]'' released.
*29 – [[Legacy (2006) 38|''Legacy'' (2006) 38]] released.
*?? – ''[[Imprint]]'' published in 2009 Fan Club membership kit.

==August==
*[[August 5|05]] – [[Dark Times: Blue Harvest 0|''Dark Times: Blue Harvest'' 0]] released.
*05 – [[Invasion 2|''Invasion'' 2]] released.
*[[August 12|12]] – [[The Clone Wars 8|''The Clone Wars'' 8]] released.
*[[August 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Visual Guide Ultimate Battles]]'' published.
*[[August 18|18]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Abyss]]'' published.
*18 – ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' published.
*[[August 19|19]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 44|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 44]] released.
*[[August 26|26]] – [[Dark Times 14|''Dark Times'' 14]] released.
*26 – [[Legacy (2006) 39|''Legacy'' (2006) 39]] released.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[Rebel Force: Firefight]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Draw Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' released.
*[[September 2|02]] – [[Invasion 3|''Invasion'' 3]] released.
*[[September 3|03]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Holocron Heist]]'' novelization released.
*03 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 1: Breakout Squad]]'' released.
*03 – ''[[Timeline 4: The Empire Changes Strategy]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[September 8|08]] – ''[[Droids Over Iego]]'' released.
*[[September 10|10]] – ''[[Death Troopers: Recovered Messages from Purge]]'' released online.
*[[September 12|12]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters (Part III)]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[September 15|15]] – ''[[Galaxy at War]]'' released.
*15 – [[Star Wars Insider 112|''Star Wars Insider'' 112]] published.
*15 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Clone Commandos]]'' released.
*[[September 16|16]] – [[The Clone Wars 9|''The Clone Wars'' 9]] released.
*16 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 45|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 45]] released.
*[[September 24|24]] - ''[[The Shadow Syndicate]]'', the fourth expansion of the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]] is released.
*[[September 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Mind Tricks]]'' match-three mobile puzzle game released.
*[[September 30|30]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Act on Instinct]]'' webcomic begins.
*30 – [[Legacy (2006) 40|''Legacy'' (2006) 40]] released.

==October==
*[[October 2|02]] – ''The Clone Wars'': [[The Clone Wars: Season Two|Season Two]] began with the episodes "[[Holocron Heist]]" and "[[Cargo of Doom]]."
*02 – ''[[HoloNet News — A Galaxy Divided (Part 1)]]'' released.
*[[October 5|05]] – ''[[The Clone Wars - Force Jump Training]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[October 6|06]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes]]'' released.
*06 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' released.
*06 – ''[[The Clone Wars - Clone Weapons Training]]'' released on StarWars.com.
*[[October 7|07]] – [[Invasion 4|''Invasion'' 4]] published.
*[[October 9|09]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Children of the Force]]" aired.
*[[October 10|10]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]'' released.
*[[October 13|13]] – ''[[Death Troopers]]'' released.
*13 – [[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]] is released for [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Microsoft_Windows PC].
*[[October 14|14]] – [[Star Wars: Invasion 0|''Star Wars: Invasion'' 0]] released.
*[[October 16|16]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Senate Spy]]" aired.
*[[October 21|21]] – [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 7: Dueling Ambitions]] released.
*[[October 22|22]] – [[Don Ivan Punchatz]] dies.
*21 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 46|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 46]] released.
*[[October 23|23]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 2: New Galactic Order]]'' webcomic concludes.
*23 – ''[[Timeline 5: The Battle of Bothawui]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[October 27|27]] – ''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' released.
*27 – [[Star Wars Insider 113|''Star Wars Insider'' 113]] published.
*27 – ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Vader]]'' released in Canada and the United Kingdom.
*[[October 28|28]] – [[Legacy (2006) 41|''Legacy'' (2006) 41]] released.
*28 – ''[[Jaws of the Sarlacc]]'' tenth and final adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[October 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars – The Official Episode Guide: Season 1]]'' released.

==November==
*[[November 3|03]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season One|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': The Complete Season One]] released.
*03 – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed: Ultimate Sith Edition]] released for Xbox 360 and Playstation 3.
*03 – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'' released for the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation Portable|PlayStation Portable]] and [[Wikipedia:Nintendo DS|Nintendo DS]].
*[[November 4|04]] – [[Invasion 5|''Invasion'' 5]] released.
*04 – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Landing at Point Rain]]" aired.
*[[November 6|06]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 3: Uncertain Surrender]]'' webcomic begins publishing online.
*[[November 11|11]] – ''[[Star Wars: Purge: Seconds to Die]]'' released.
*11 – [[The Clone Wars 10|''The Clone Wars'' 10]] released.
*[[November 12|12]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.1|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.1]] published.
*[[November 13|13]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Weapons Factory]]" aired.
*[[November 17|17]] – ''[[Scavenger's Guide to Droids]]'' released.
*17 – ''[[Star Wars: Trench Run]]'' released.
*[[November 18|18]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 47|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 47]] released.
*[[November 20|20]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Legacy of Terror]]" aired.
*20 – ''[[The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs]]'' is released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[November 24|24]] – [[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']] paperback released.
*[[November 25|25]] – [[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 7: Storms]] released.
*25 – [[Legacy (2006) 42|''Legacy'' (2006) 42]] released.

==December==
*[[December 2|02]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Slaves of the Republic (TPB)|''Star Wars The Clone Wars: Slaves of the Republic'' trade paperback]] released.
*[[December 3|03]] – "[[Dining at Dex's]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[December 4|04]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Brain Invaders]]" aired.
*[[December 7|07]] – "[[Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster]]" released on Hyperspace.
*07 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Pirates... and Worse!]]'' published.
*[[December 8|08]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Dynasty of Evil]]'' released.
*08 - [[December 11|11]] – [[Xim Week: The Despotica]] four-part [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]-exclusive article added to [[StarWars.com]].
*[[December 9|09]] – [[The Clone Wars 11|''The Clone Wars'' 11]] released.
*[[December 10|10]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.2|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.2]] published.
*[[December 12|12]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' announced at the Spike Video Game Awards.
*[[December 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Insider 114|''Star Wars Insider'' 114]] published.
*15 – ''[[The Nightsister's Revenge]]'', the 6th expansion of the [[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]] is released.
*[[December 16|16]] – [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy (hardcover)|''Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy'']] is released.
*[[December 22|22]] – "[[Shades of Gray]]" is released on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[December 23|23]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Colossus of Destiny]]'' released.
*23 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 48|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 48]] released.
*23 – [[Legacy (2006) 43|''Legacy'' (2006) 43]] released.
